data.caption:
🚨 NOW OPEN 🚨

The Zip-Line at Gary’s Family Resort is officially OPEN for the season! 🌲☀️

Come soar through the air and add some extra adventure to your summer!

🕐 Zip-Line Hours: Sunday–Friday | 1 PM – 6 PM

Bring your friends, family, and your sense of adventure! 

We can’t wait to see you out there. 🎉

Visit us online for more information:
garysfamilyresort.com

#funatgarys #SummerFun #FamilyAdventure #ZiplineAdventure #vacationmode

Due to the weather, the golf course will be closed today. ☔️⛳️

The Jiffy Pup will still be open during our normal Saturday night hours from 9–11 PM! Stop by for some great food and a fun night at Gary’s! 🌭

The whole place will be open tomorrow and Monday as well!!

🎉 Looking for the perfect spot for your next gathering? Gary’s has you covered! 🌳⛳️

Our Pavilion & Gazebo are available to rent for: 🎂 Birthday Parties 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family Reunions ⛪️ Church Picnics 🎓 Graduation Parties 🎉 And so much more!
🔥 The Pavilion also includes access to a gas grill — perfect for cookouts and summer gatherings!

PLUS… when your group rents either the Pavilion or Gazebo, the SECOND game of mini golf for everyone in your group is completely FREE! ⛳️

Spend the day making memories with great food, fun activities, and time together at Gary’s Family Resort 💙

📞 Call (814) 274-9401 for availability & pricing! 📩 Or send us a message on Facebook or Instagram, or email us at garysputtergolf@gmail.com

#funatgarys #GarysFamilyResort #PartyVenue #birthdayparty #familyfun

☀️ THE WAIT IS OVER… Gary’s is officially OPEN for the 2026 Summer Season! 🎉🌊⛳️🍦

We’re ready for another unforgettable summer filled with mini golf, Jiffy Pup eats & sweet treats, zip-lining, family memories, and so much more at Gary’s! 💙

🕒 Hours: • Sunday (May 17): 11am–8pm • Mon–Thurs: 4pm–8pm • Friday: 2pm–6pm • Saturday: 9pm–11pm • Memorial Day (May 25): 11am–8pm

Grab your friends, bring the family, and kick off summer with us! We can’t wait to see everyone back for another amazing season. ☀️

#funatgarys #getawayatgarys #MiniGolfFun #Summer2026 #FamilyFunDay
